name: Freedom Holding Corp.
business: Freedom Holding Corp. acts as a holding company for subsidiaries engaged in securities brokerage, securities dealing, market making, investment research, investment counseling, retail and commercial banking, and insurance products, as well as ancillary businesses including payment processing, ticketing, e-commerce, cloud services, and telecommunications and media businesses in Kazakhstan. The company's main market is Kazakhstan, and it serves retail brokerage customers, institutional customers, and individual and corporate banking and insurance customers across Europe, Asia, and North America.

exposures.sentence: The Freedom SuperApp is the Group's front end for all retail banking, payment, insurance and lifestyle services.
Our Insurance segment offers life and general insurance services.
We recently have expanded into the telecommunications and media sectors through our subsidiaries Freedom Telecom and Freedom Media.

The Other segment accounted for $172.8 million, or 8%, of our total revenue, net for the fiscal year ended March 31, 2026. This revenue was mainly derived from online retail trade and e-commerce services, provision of payment processing services, retail online ticket sales and online aggregation of purchasing air and railway tickets.

During fiscal 2024, we established Freedom Media as a subsidiary of Freedom Telecom. Freedom Media is intended to develop into a national media platform in Kazakhstan, offering streaming services to customers in Kazakhstan and the broader Central Asia region.

In November 2025, we signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding with the Kazakhstan Ministry of AI and Digital Development and NVIDIA Corporation with a view to develop a large-scale AI data center in Kazakhstan.

In November 2025, we signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding with the Kazakhstan Ministry of AI and Digital Development and NVIDIA Corporation with a view to develop a large-scale AI data center in Kazakhstan.

catalysts.event: Signed non-binding MOU for AI data center with Kazakhstan Ministry of AI and Digital Development and NVIDIA Corporation
catalysts.sentence: In November 2025, we signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding with the Kazakhstan Ministry of AI and Digital Development and NVIDIA Corporation with a view to develop a large-scale AI data center in Kazakhstan.

catalysts.event: UAE subsidiary received a brokerage license from Abu Dhabi Global Market Financial Services Regulatory Authority
catalysts.sentence: On December 29, 2025, our UAE subsidiary Freedom Broker Global Markets Ltd. received a brokerage license in the UAE issued by the Abu Dhabi Global Market Financial Services Regulatory Authority.

catalysts.event: Entered into agreement to purchase approximately 99.32% of Turkish Bank A.S.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, FRHC and its subsidiary Freedom Finansial Hizmetler Anonim Şirketi entered into an agreement to purchase approximately 99.32% of Turkish Bank A.S., a bank operating in Türkiye.
